positive: A highly stylized and vibrant illustration of a mystical, ethereal forest scene at twilight. The composition should feature a central grouping of ancient, glowing flora and fauna silhouettes, such as illuminated mushrooms, curled vines, and whimsical woodland creatures (like stylized deer or foxes) partially visible in the undergrowth. The color palette should emphasize deep jewel tones—sapphire blue, emerald green, and amethyst purple—contrasted sharply with pops of brilliant gold or phosphorescent teal light emanating from the lifeforms. The art style must mimic modern decorative screen printing or woodcut engraving, with crisp lines, high contrast, and a repeating, border-friendly motif potential. The overall feel should be magical, serene, and richly detailed, perfect for a high-quality apparel print. Full view, centered composition, clean lines, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, low-detail, amateur drawing, writing, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, dirty, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, out of frame, cropped, abstract, realistic photo, bokeh
